title: jj Skill — Op-Log Recovery Rule Implementation Plan
summary: Task-by-task runbook for implementing the jj skill op-log recovery rule, updating SKILL.md and jj-reference.md with recovery ladder and approval gates.
notes: Execution/runbook document. The architectural decision (gate jj op restore and jj op abandon behind approval) was made in the referenced design spec. This doc provides step-by-step implementation guidance for agents, including task verification, linting, commit procedures, and bead lifecycle management.
